narrative.context: After a heated debate, your body still feels tense and you keep replaying the conversation. You want to calm down but feel stuck.
narrative.prompt: What is the most effective emotion management step?

options.label: Use a structured cool-down
options.description: Do a short walk or breathing, then write one reflection: what mattered, what you can control next time, and one repair step if needed.

ei.rationale: Combines physiological down-regulation with cognitive reframing—effective management.

options.label: Distract for a while
options.description: Watch something to shift attention away from rumination.

ei.rationale: Can reduce arousal short-term, but may not resolve the emotional loop.

options.label: Message them immediately in anger
options.description: Send more arguments to continue the fight.

ei.rationale: Escalation increases distress and conflict; poor management.
